TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Australian_Antarctic_Territory, title = Australian_Antarctic_Territory, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Australian_Antarctic_Territory} }

S.FORM: Australian Antarctic Territory kmal mha Astralian ga, maki' squ rhzyal na Śćóś•Ķśī≤ ga, kya qu rhzyal nha' ma. kinkhmay na squliq nya' ga, ini' tehuk 1000, cinrhzyal nya' ga, 5,896,500 km2. spzyang kinhopa' na rhzyal ga, TongFangCan( biqan nya' Russia ru kblayun nha' Kenkyu), kingwagiq nya' ga, 4030m. Dome A qu spzyang gwagiq. tunux na renwa nha' ga, +672. cingay qu Kokka kmayal mha kya qu rhzyal nha' maki' squ Śćóś•Ķśī≤,spzyang hopa' hga, Australian. == pintbcyan na rhzyal ==

Australian Antarctic Territory kmal mha Astralian ga, maki' squ rhzyal na Śćóś•Ķśī≤ ga, kya qu rhzyal nha' ma. kinkhmay na squliq nya' ga, ini' tehuk 1000, cinrhzyal nya' ga, 5,896,500 km2. spzyang kinhopa' na rhzyal ga, TongFangCan( biqan nya' Russia ru kblayun nha' Kenkyu), kingwagiq nya' ga, 4030m. Dome A qu spzyang gwagiq. tunux na renwa nha' ga, +672. cingay qu Kokka kmayal mha kya qu rhzyal nha' maki' squ Śćóś•Ķśī≤,spzyang hopa' hga, Australian. == pintbcyan na rhzyal ==
S.PHON: aus~…ētralian antar ¶~ ®ti ¶~ ® territorj kmal mńßa as~…ētralian …£a, maki Ē s~…ēqu rńßzjal na *** …£a, kja qu rńßzjal nńßa Ē ma. kinkńßmaj na s~…ēquliq nja Ē …£a, ini Ē teńßuk ****, ¶~ ®inrńßzjal nja Ē …£a, *,***,*** km*. s~…ēpzjaŇč kinńßopa Ē na rńßzjal …£a, toŇč*aŇč ¶~ ®an( ő≤iqan nja Ē rus~…ēs~…ēia ru kő≤lajun nńßa Ē kenkju), kiŇčwa…£iq nja Ē …£a, ****m. *ome a qu s~…ēpzjaŇč …£wa…£iq. tunux na renwa nńßa Ē …£a, +***. ¶~ ®iŇčaj qu kokka kmajal mńßa kja qu rńßzjal nńßa Ē maki Ē s~…ēqu ***,s~…ēpzjaŇč ńßopa Ē ńß…£a, aus~…ētralian. == pintő≤ ¶~ ®jan na rńßzjal ==
